creator: bobf@mrp3.com
text:
Pane load time is excessive on startup, and if re-loaded via 'kill -HUP' on gnome-panel.  Dialog boxes (such as 'add item to panel') are also irritatingly slow when loading.  After panel or initial dialog box loads, performance is acceptable.

Additional information (port versions)

X.Org X Server 1.7.5
Release Date: 2010-02-16
X Protocol Version 11, Revision 0
Build Operating System: FreeBSD 8.1-PRERELEASE amd64 
Current Operating System: FreeBSD hack.SFT.local 8.1-PRERELEASE FreeBSD 8.1-PRERELEASE #1: Fri Jun 25 18:21:02 PDT 2010     root@hack.SFT.local:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC amd64
Build Date: 29 June 2010  05:09:29PM
 
Current version of pixman: 0.16.6

Fix: 

none
How-To-Repeat: 1.  observe gnome startup (how long it takes for panel to appear)

2.  when panel appears, right-click open area of panel, select 'add to panel' and observe time required to display dialog box.
